ddls:
CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the child in years */,
  "agemonths" REAL /* Age of the child in months */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the child */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the child */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special needs the child may have */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Parental contact information */,
  "education_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the child */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the child's family */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the child */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child participating in the trial */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task in the trial */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the task in the trial */,
  "boxtype" TEXT /* Type of box used in the trial */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer given by the child */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the answer was correct */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in minutes */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "trial_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the trial was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the transfer record belongs to */,
  "transfer_value" REAL /* Value indicating the child's ability to transfer knowledge */,
  "transfer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explanations" (
  "explanation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explanation */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the explanation belongs to */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the child's answer */,
  "explanation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the explanation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explanation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenters" (
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "experimenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the experimenter */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the experimenter has */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the experimenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child participating in the session */,
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimenter conducting the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_experimenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id")
)
